summary.lv: SEHNER-International meklē Data Team Lead, kas vadīs datu komandu un nodrošinās augstas kvalitātes un uzticamu datu piegādi biznesa lēmumu pieņemšanai.
summary.en: SEHNER-International is hiring a Data Team Lead to manage the data team and deliver high-quality, reliable data for business decision-making.
